summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Project Atlas banking platform. Customer features working well with professional UI. Critical issue: Admin sidebar with 9 menu items NOT implemented - still using old 4-tab navigation. Analytics dashboard inaccessible.

minor_issues.issue: P2P transfer fails when recipient doesn't have a bank account (404 error)
minor_issues.impact: Backend test failed, but frontend P2P transfer works when transferring to users with accounts
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior - API correctly validates recipient has account

critical_bugs.issue: Admin sidebar with 9 menu items NOT implemented. Still using old tab-based navigation with only 4 tabs (User Management, KYC Review, Support Tickets, Audit Logs)
critical_bugs.expected: AdminSidebar component with 9 sections: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Ledger Tools, Transactions, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings
critical_bugs.actual: Old tab navigation with 4 tabs only
critical_bugs.fix_required: AdminDashboard component in App.js needs to be refactored to use AdminSidebar component from AdminLayout.js

critical_bugs.issue: Analytics dashboard (Overview section) is NOT accessible - no navigation option exists
critical_bugs.expected: Overview/Analytics section with charts showing user growth, transactions, KYC status
critical_bugs.actual: No way to access analytics dashboard from admin interface
critical_bugs.note: AnalyticsDashboard component exists in Analytics.js but is not integrated into AdminDashboard

passed_tests: Login page UI - white background confirmed
Login page UI - red button (#D32F2F) confirmed
Login page UI - Inter font confirmed
Customer dashboard - 4 stat tiles present (Accounts, Cards, Transfers, Statements)
P2P transfer form visible on dashboard
P2P transfer form has all fields (email, amount, reason, submit)
P2P transfer functionality WORKS - successfully transferred €1.00
Transaction history updates after P2P transfer
Mobile bottom tabs visible on mobile viewport
Admin users table with search input
Admin users table with status filter
Admin users table with role filter

critical_priority.task: Implement AdminSidebar integration in AdminDashboard component
critical_priority.details: The AdminDashboard component in /app/frontend/src/App.js is NOT using the AdminSidebar component from AdminLayout.js. It's still using old tab-based navigation with only 4 tabs. Need to refactor AdminDashboard to use AdminSidebar with 9 menu items: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Ledger Tools, Transactions, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings.

The AnalyticsDashboard component exists in /app/frontend/src/components/Analytics.js but is not accessible from the admin interface. Need to add Overview/Analytics section that renders AnalyticsDashboard with charts.

medium_priority.task: Add remaining admin sections to sidebar navigation
medium_priority.details: Once sidebar is integrated, ensure all 9 sections are functional: Accounts, Ledger Tools, Transactions sections need to be created/integrated

what_works_well: Customer dashboard has excellent professional UI with white background and red accents
P2P transfer functionality works perfectly with toast notifications
Mobile responsive design with bottom tabs
Admin user management with search and filters works well
Backend APIs are solid (91.7% pass rate)
Design requirements met: no gradients, red accent color, Inter font
what_needs_fixing: Admin sidebar with 9 items is the main blocker - not implemented despite being mentioned as complete
Analytics dashboard exists but is not accessible
AdminDashboard needs major refactoring to use AdminSidebar component
